nodes.name: 3d.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for integrating Three.js and React Three Fiber into Remotion compositions, covering ThreeCanvas usage, frame-driven animation constraints, and Sequence compatibility.

nodes.name: animations.md
nodes.summary: Concise rule guide prescribing how Remotion animations must be driven exclusively by useCurrentFrame() to ensure deterministic, frame-accurate rendering.

nodes.name: assets.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for importing and referencing assets in Remotion, covering the public folder convention, staticFile() usage, component integration, remote URLs, and key restrictions.

nodes.name: audio.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive rule guide for using audio in Remotion, covering the Audio component, trimming, delaying, volume control, muting, speed, looping, and pitch manipulation.

nodes.name: calculate-metadata.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for using Remotion's calculateMetadata function to dynamically derive composition duration and dimensions from video sources, with patterns for multi-video and prop transformation use cases.

nodes.name: can-decode.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for the Remotion canDecode() function, detailing how to check browser codec support for video/audio before rendering, including Blob-based file usage.

nodes.name: charts.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for creating animated charts in Remotion, prescribing useCurrentFrame()-driven bar chart and pie chart animations with staggered bar patterns.

nodes.name: compositions.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for defining Remotion compositions, covering default props, folder organization, Still compositions for static frames, and calculateMetadata integration.

nodes.name: display-captions.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for rendering synchronized captions in Remotion using page-based sequencing and word-level highlighting driven by caption timing data.

nodes.name: extract-frames.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive rule guide for the extractFrames() function in Remotion, covering basic usage, filmstrip creation, AbortSignal cancellation, and Promise.race timeout patterns.

nodes.name: fonts.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for loading and using fonts in Remotion via @remotion/google-fonts and @remotion/fonts packages, including async font loading, multiple weight support, and component usage patterns.

nodes.name: get-audio-duration.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for retrieving audio file duration in Remotion using the Mediabunny library, with patterns for remote URLs, local files, and staticFile() integration.

nodes.name: get-video-dimensions.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for querying video width and height in Remotion using the Mediabunny library, covering remote URLs, local files, and staticFile() usage.

nodes.name: get-video-duration.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for retrieving video duration in Remotion using the Mediabunny library, with patterns for remote URLs, local files, and staticFile() integration.

nodes.name: gifs.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for embedding animated GIFs and WebP sequences in Remotion using the Gif component, covering sizing, playback speed, looping, styling, and duration retrieval.

nodes.name: images.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for displaying images in Remotion using the Img component, covering local and remote sources, sizing/positioning, dynamic paths, and image dimension retrieval.

nodes.name: import-srt-captions.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for importing .srt subtitle files into Remotion using parseSrt() from @remotion/captions, with patterns for reading the file and applying captions to a composition.

nodes.name: lottie.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for using Lottie animations in Remotion via the @remotion/lottie package, covering installation, displaying a Lottie file, and styling with frame-driven animation control.

nodes.name: measuring-dom-nodes.md
nodes.summary: Concise rule guide for measuring DOM element dimensions in Remotion compositions using React refs and getBoundingClientRect for layout-dependent rendering.

nodes.name: measuring-text.md
nodes.summary: Rule guide for measuring text dimensions in Remotion using @remotion/layout-utils, covering measureText, fitText, checkMultilineOverflow, and best practices for font-synchronized measurements.
